description_long: This hoverboard features a sleek, modern design with a blue galaxy-themed exterior, giving it a vibrant and futuristic appearance. The body is composed of two main footpads, each with a black, textured surface for grip, separated by a central pivot. On each side, there are large, silver-colored wheels with a five-spoke design, partially enclosed by the body shell. The hoverboard's shell appears to be made of durable plastic, with subtle contours and a glossy finish. A small brand marking is visible on one side, adding a touch of branding detail. The overall build suggests a sturdy, rideable device suitable for personal urban transportation.
description: A blue galaxy-themed hoverboard with black grip footpads and large silver wheels, featuring a glossy, contoured plastic shell and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing both black footpads, the central pivot, and the brand marking on the left side of the blue galaxy-patterned shell.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large silver wheel with a five-spoke design and the contoured blue shell wrapping around the wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying both footpads and the central pivot, but without visible branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other large silver wheel and the blue shell, mirroring the features of view 1.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Two large, parallel wheels located at each end of the board, partially enclosed by the shell, with a five-spoke silver design.
attribute_footpad_design: Two rectangular black footpads with a textured, grippy surface, slightly raised edges, and likely pressure sensors embedded beneath for rider detection.
attribute_brand_logo: A small brand marking with the text 'FANBOARDS' is visible on the left side of the shell in the front view.
